title: lotus creticus var. prostratus
intro: Lotus creticus var. prostratus, also known as Creeping Lotus, is a type of succulent plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lotus creticus var. prostratus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used topically or internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
